assertion_results.text: Output maps ValidationError to 400 Bad Request
assertion_results.evidence: Output states: "It maps to HTTP 400 Bad Request" for ValidationError

assertion_results.text: Output maps InvalidDataError to 422 Unprocessable Entity
assertion_results.evidence: Output states: "It maps to HTTP 422 Unprocessable Entity" for InvalidDataError

assertion_results.text: Output states ValidationError belongs in application or infrastructure layers
assertion_results.evidence: Output states: "use it in the application or infrastructure layers when incoming request data fails basic structural validation"

assertion_results.text: Output states InvalidDataError belongs in domain entities, value objects, or builders
assertion_results.evidence: Output states: "use it in domain entities, value objects, and builders when business invariants or domain validations fail"

assertion_results.text: Output clearly distinguishes the two errors by layer and purpose
assertion_results.evidence: Output provides distinct definitions: ValidationError=structural/DTO/400/application-infra vs InvalidDataError=domain-business-rule/422/domain layer
